rows.label: tev001391_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good day to you, [ST:playername ]. Have
you come to check on us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0002
rows.name:
Rock now has a job, and we are able
to live at peace here in NLA. We owe
all of these blessings to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0003
rows.name:
I do not know how to thank you
for all that you have done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_JNK0010
rows.name: Deflect

rows.label: tev001391_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that it's all due to Celica's hard work.

rows.label: tev001391_JNK0020
rows.name: Laud

rows.label: tev001391_SEL0021
rows.name: Credit Rock's courage for this outcome.

rows.label: tev001391_JNK0030
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: tev001391_SEL0031
rows.name: Say that you also can't comprehend how truly awesome you are.

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0004
rows.name: Dear me, no. That is most kind, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, I'm afraid there is
precious little that I am capable
of accomplishing by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0006
rows.name:
It is thanks to all of you
that I am able to function as
a member of this fair city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0007
rows.name:
You are correct! Rock's courage
has saved me time and time again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0008
rows.name: I know that he shall never let me down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am truly fortunate to
have him as a friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0010
rows.name:
What a delightful sense
of humor you have![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0011
rows.name:
That is one of the things I love
about this fair city— there are so
many upbeat and positive people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0012
rows.name:
I think that is part of the reason
we were accepted here so readily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0013
rows.name:
Until now, we have lived lives of fear
and stress, ever on the run from Samaar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'd assumed we were doomed to a
most miserable type of existence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0015
rows.name:
It never occurred to me that
Rock could make friends with
others and be so...happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0016
rows.name:
And being able to live in this
fair city has done much to
put my own heart at ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0017
rows.name:
I am so very glad we met
back in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0018
rows.name:
I shall hold these feelings of gratitude
close until the day that I can say that I
have repaid my fellow citizens of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0019
rows.name: And I know that Rock feels the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001391_MSG0020
rows.name:
I do hope you will bear with us while
we work to settle our debt to you.[ST:wait ]
